description_for_human: Access snapshot pricing, institutional ownership, historical pricing, chains, and news data from LSEG/Refinitiv.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to retrieve real-time price snapshots (OHLC, bid/ask, volume, market cap), institutional ownership breakdowns and 13F holdings, historical end-of-day pricing, index constituents and option chains, and financial news headlines from LSEG (formerly Refinitiv). Best for comprehensive market intelligence and securities research.

functions.name: get_price_snapshot
functions.description: Retrieve real-time or delayed price snapshot for a security including OHLC, volume, bid/ask, and market cap via Refinitiv Snapshot Pricing API.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or RIC code (e.g., AAPL, MSFT.O)

functions.name: get_institutional_ownership
functions.description: Retrieve institutional ownership data including top holders, ownership changes, and 13F holdings via Refinitiv Ownership API.

holder_type.description: Type of holder to filter by: institutional, insider, or fund

functions.name: get_price_history
functions.description: Retrieve historical end-of-day pricing data for a security over a specified date range.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or RIC code (e.g., AAPL, MSFT.O)

frequency.description: Data frequency: daily, weekly, or monthly

functions.name: get_chain
functions.description: Retrieve index constituents or option chain members for a given chain RIC via Refinitiv Chains API.

chain_ric.description: Chain RIC code (e.g., 0#.SPX for S&P 500 constituents)

functions.name: get_news_headlines
functions.description: Retrieve financial news headlines filtered by company, topic, or date range via Refinitiv News API.

query.description: Search query for news (e.g., company name, topic, or RIC)

count.description: Maximum number of results to return
